#### `{r} sR$headings$organism_resistance`

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeIntroductionTexts)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-organism-resistance.Rmd")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeMethodsTexts)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_methods-organism-resistance.Rmd")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| label: tbl-organism-resistance-rate
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table) &&
    "n_own" %in% rlang::names2(benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table) &&
    sum(benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {

  # Check if reference data columns exist
  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table)

  tbl_data <- benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table
  cw <- compute_col_widths(tbl_data, stub_min = 27, has_reference = has_reference)

  ci_pattern <- ci_pattern_inline

  tbl <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(c("n_ref", ".ontology_path", "ia_tst_tot_own"))) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      group = dplyr::if_else(
        stringr::str_detect(group, "spp."),
        paste0("*", stringr::str_extract(group, "^(.+) spp\\.(.*)$", 1), "* spp.", stringr::str_extract(group, "^(.+) spp\\.(.*)$", 2)),
        group
      )) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$n := "n_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$rate := "pooled_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref"))

  ci_cols_to_drop <- character(0)
  if (!include_rate_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own")
  if (!include_pooled_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref")
  if (!include_quartile_ci)
    ci_cols_to_drop <- c(ci_cols_to_drop,
      "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
      "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
      "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")
  if (length(ci_cols_to_drop) > 0)
    tbl <- tbl |> dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(ci_cols_to_drop))

  tbl <- tbl |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(c("ia_tst_tot_ref"))) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      abr = dplyr::recode_values(
        .data$abr,
        "3gcr" ~ "3gcr",
        "car" ~ sR$car,
        "cor" ~ sR$cor,
        "mrsa" ~ sR$mrsa,
        "vre" ~ sR$vre),
      level = .data$level + 2) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$abr) |>
    gt(rowname_col = "group") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::tab_options(
      latex.header_repeat = TRUE,
      latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = cw$font_size,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = !(tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$n) | tidyselect::matches("^(group|level|taxon|abr)$")),
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$n),
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    gt::fmt_markdown(
      columns = "group"
    ) |>
    gt::tab_stub_indent(
      rows = gt::everything(),
      indent = gt::from_column(column = "level")
    ) |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = gt::md(sR$`3gcr`),
      rows = abr == "3gcr"
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(
        weight = "bold"
      ),
      locations = cells_row_groups()
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(
        weight = "bold"
      ),
      locations = cells_stub(
        rows = taxon %in% c("genus")
      )
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(
        style = "italic"
      ),
      locations = cells_stub(
        rows = taxon %in% c("species")
      )
    ) |>
    cols_hide(columns = any_of(c("level","taxon"))) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = list(
        cells_column_spanners(),
        cells_column_labels(),
        cells_row_groups()
      )
    ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$`rate_name`,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(
          c(
            sR$table_headers$rate,
            sR$table_headers$pooled,
            sR$table_headers$q1,
            sR$table_headers$q2,
            sR$table_headers$q3)),
        id = "organism_resistance_rate",
        level = 2
      ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = md(
        paste0(
          "$$\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$`rate_name`,
          "} = \\frac{\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$`rate_numerator`,
          "}}{\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$`rate_denominator`,
          "}} \\times ",
          format_integer(100),
          "$$"
        )),
      locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "organism_resistance_rate"),
      placement = "right"
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n),
      placement = "right"
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$rate_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$rate),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$rate),
      placement = "right"
    )

  if (include_rate_ci && "ci_lower_own" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$rate, "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own)
      )
  }
  if (include_pooled_ci && "ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$pooled, "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_ref)
      )
  }
  if ("q1_ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    if (include_quartile_ci) {
      has_boot <- !is.na(tbl$`_data`[["q1_ci_lower_ref"]])
      tbl <- tbl |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = ci_pattern,
          rows = has_boot
        )
    } else {
      tbl <- tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
        "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
        "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")))
    }
  }

  if (has_reference) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(cw$rate),
        sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(cw$pooled),
        sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(cw$q),
        sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(cw$q),
        sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(cw$q)
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$own_data_label,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(sR$table_headers$n, sR$table_headers$rate)),
        id = "department_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$reference_data,
        columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3),
        id = "reference_data"
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$pooled_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$pooled),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled),
        placement = "right")
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(cw$rate)
      )
  }

  if (any(!is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own) & tbl_data$n_own < sparse_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    sparse_note <- glue::glue(if (include_rate_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci, threshold = sparse_threshold)
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::tab_footnote(
        footnote = sparse_note,
        locations = cells_body(
          columns = sR$table_headers$n,
          rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled_own) & tbl_data$n_own < sparse_threshold),
        placement = "right")
  }

  # Resistance category overlap source note
  tbl <- tbl |>
    gt::tab_source_note(
      source_note = sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$resistance_overlap_footnote)

  # n.o.s. definition source note
  if (any(tbl_data$taxon == "species_nos", na.rm = TRUE)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::tab_source_note(source_note = sR$nos_footnote)
  }

  tbl
} else {
  no_data_table()
}

```

```{r}
#| output: asis
# Show explanation when no organism-specific data exists
if (is.null(benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table) ||
    !("n_own" %in% rlang::names2(benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table)) ||
    sum(benchmark_data$organism_resistance_rate_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
  cat("\n\n::: {.callout-note}\n")
  cat(sR$`tbl-organism-resistance-rate`$no_data, "\n")
  cat(":::\n")
}
```
